query_normalized: investigating the predictive power of machine learning for identifying novel phase-change materials materials science
rationale: The paper is a general survey on "learning curves" as a methodological tool for algorithm selection and resource management in machine learning, which does not address the specific domain of materials science, phase-change materials, or the predictive modeling of material properties. It fails to meet any inclusion criteria (a-f) as it studies the performance of ML algorithms themselves rather than the physical mechanism or empirical population of interest, and it is not a foundational reference
